summary: Cannabis wholesale businesses that manage retailer accounts, territory coverage, distributor orders, CRM follow-up, and account-specific proposal or savings workflows.
tenantDocScope: Applies to every tenant with tenantType.id=cannabis_wholesale unless that tenant explicitly overrides the rule in its tenant-specific docs or workspace config.
tenantSpecificDocScope: Tenant docs under docs/tenants/<tenant>/ may document tenant-only integrations, credential names, field mappings, migration history, and acceptance criteria.
securityBoundaries: Every runtime row must be scoped by organization_id.
Provider credentials must be tenant-scoped credentials stored through encrypted integration installs or tenant-scoped environment keys.
Cannabis wholesale defaults must never expose one tenant's CRM, distributor, route, document, or order data to another tenant.
